best_unix_strategy: Use one unix command such as a Python or awk one-liner to parse only the Active Escalations table, filter Severity 1 or 2, strip Markdown link markup/backticks/backslash escapes, and emit JSON directly instead of building JSON through guarded sed/awk pipelines.
observed_outcome: mdtools and hybrid passed; unix failed after extracting the right rows because final JSON assembly/response formatting hit guarded shell quoting and separator constraints.
rationale: The unix trace already found the right table rows and fields; the failure was JSON emission and shell command quoting/runner protocol, not inability to understand Markdown structure. Therefore it is not promotable under the AST-structural-only gate.
